intro.en: I'm Yijie Lin, currently pursuing a Ph.D. at the Multimedia and Secure Networking Laboratory (MSN Lab), Department of Information Engineering and Computer Science, College of Information and Electrical Engineering, Feng Chia University, under the supervision of Chair Professor Chin-Chen Chang. My research interests include data hiding, information security, image processing, and artificial intelligence. As of May 2026, I have had 18 papers accepted or published in international journals and conferences, including 14 as the first or corresponding author.
intro.zh_Hans: 我是林翼洁，目前正在逢甲大学资讯电机学院资讯工程系多媒体暨网络安全实验室（MSN Lab）攻读博士学位，师从张真诚讲座教授。我的主要研究兴趣包括：数据隐藏、信息安全、图像处理和人工智能。截至2026年5月，已接受或发表国际期刊及会议论文18篇，其中第一或通讯作者14篇。
